description: Express app calling a render module that transitively invokes lodash _.template() with user input, triggering CVE-2021-23337 prototype pollution RCE.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: app.js calls render() from render.js which calls _.template(tmpl) with user-supplied template string

findings.human_justification: _.template() is called in render.js which is invoked from the /render route in app.js. The vulnerable function is transitively reachable from the application entry point with user-controlled input.
